commands.cmd: sh -c 'npm i -g corepack@latest && corepack enable && corepack prepare --activate'
commands.customName: npm i -g corepack@latest && corepack enable && corepack prepare --activate

commands.cmd: sh -c 'cd "apps/web" && standalone_dirs="$(find . -path "*/node_modules" -prune -o -type d -name standalone -print)" && [ "$(printf "%s\n" "$standalone_dirs" | sed "/^$/d" | wc -l)" -eq 1 ] && standalone_dir="$standalone_dirs" && app_server_rel="apps/web/server.js" && if [ -f "$standalone_dir/server.js" ]; then server_rel=server.js; elif [ -f "$standalone_dir/$app_server_rel" ]; then server_rel="$app_server_rel"; else exit 1; fi && server_dir="$(dirname "$server_rel")" && dist_dir="${standalone_dir%/standalone}" && rm -rf "/railpack/next-standalone" && mkdir -p "/railpack/next-standalone" && cp -a "$standalone_dir/." "/railpack/next-standalone" && mkdir -p "/railpack/next-standalone"/"$server_dir"/"$dist_dir" && cp -a "$dist_dir/static" "/railpack/next-standalone"/"$server_dir"/"$dist_dir" && cp -a public "/railpack/next-standalone"/"$server_dir"/public && if [ "$server_rel" != server.js ]; then ln -s "$server_rel" "/railpack/next-standalone"/server.js; fi'
